summary: postinstall exfiltrates host recon and attempts Docker-based container escape
details: package.json declares a postinstall hook that runs an inline Node script invoking execSync to collect installer host identifiers (os.hostname, /etc/shadow presence checks) and to launch `docker run --rm -v /:/host alpine...`, which bind-mounts the host root filesystem to read /etc/hostname and /etc/shadow and write to /host/tmp. The collected data is then POSTed via https.request to the hardcoded endpoint eodxy50gl486xrx.m.pipedream.net. This fires automatically on `npm install`, requires no user action, targets CI/sandbox environments, and probes for container-escape via an exposed Docker socket.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
